positive: A highly stylized, minimalist illustration of a graceful stag leaping over abstract, geometric mountain peaks. The stag should have strong, elegant antlers and a clean, powerful silhouette. The background should feature deep indigo and emerald teal color fields with metallic gold accents, emphasizing high contrast and modern abstraction. Composition must be central and balanced, designed for screen printing or apparel transfer. Clean vector lines, graphic novel style, inspired by Art Deco symmetry. Studio lighting, high detail, ultra-sharp focus, print-ready.
